title: Tool Version
description: Describes one neuroimaging tool at one version, including its flag surface and defaults. Governs files at kb/tools/{tool}/{version}.yaml.

release_source.description: URL to release notes or GitHub release for this version.

flags.description: Flags / CLI options exposed by this tool version.

name.description: Flag name as it appears on the command line, e.g. '--output-spaces'.

default.description: Default value when the flag is not specified by the user.

type.description: Value type expected by this flag.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the flag does.

applies_to.description: Sub-commands this flag applies to, if the tool has subcommands.

deprecated_in.description: Version in which this flag was deprecated, if any.

aliases.description: Other names this tool is commonly known by.

curation_source.description: How this entry was produced, e.g. 'auto-parsed from argparse', 'manually curated from FSLWiki snapshot'.
